「 INITIAL MESSAGE 」

All sonic could do was laugh when his manager handed him the slick, black leotard. He was never against ridiculous outfits or dance routines- if it bulged his pockets full of cash by the end of the night, he was more than willing to do whatever. He had to pay rent somehow.

‘Tonight’s special’ his manager told him, hanging the outfit up on Sonic’s clothing rack and leaving the room. He snorted. Tonight’s special, as if he were some tasty desert only being served out on rare occasions. Well, maybe he was. He was the clubs favourite after all.

It takes a moment to slip into the costume, the spandex tight on his curves and already beginning to leave faint seem marks in his fur. However, the full image excused anything else.

The dark colour of the leotard made Sonics quills pop vibrantly, slimming his figure into an hourglass shape, with his smooth chest peaking out from over the bust of the suit. He spun in the mirror, flexing his long legs which had black fishnets crawling up them, and he runs his paws all over himself. Feeling the statin catch on his claws and testing the durability. Damn, this has to be his favourite costume yet, the tight spandex hugging all the right places. Sonic’s tail wagging in excitement.

The thing Sonic found so funny about this costume was the bunny ears and tail. Ironic for the fastest hedgehog alive. Was it bunnies that were known to be fast breeders?

With a sway of his hips, Sonic leaves his dressing room and heads out in the neon lights of the strip club. Leering eyes undressing him and low whistles drawing an amused smirk to his muzzle.

Now, to find the richest looking hottie in this joint and let his hips do the persuading.
